prs.title: Ch/guided experience
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: A transformative AI automation subsystem spanning 115+ files with a full automation agent, circuit-breaker, checkpointer, metrics, tool registry, MCP integration, and guided experience orchestration — clearly weeks of architectural work.

prs.title: feat(ace): connect ACE opportunities to existing CRM deals (SM-545)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Meaningful feature connecting ACE opportunities to existing CRM deals across 6 files with new UI components, server actions, and integration logic totaling 828 lines.

prs.title: feat(ace): refresh CRM contacts at ACE push time (SM-542)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Modest focused feature adding CRM contact hydration at ACE push time across three hydration modules and an actions file, well-scoped at 238 lines.

prs.title: Clean up CRM stage mappings + LLM crosswalk gap-fill (SM-562)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Solid feature combining CRM stage mapping cleanup, an LLM-powered crosswalk gap-fill module, and a seed utility across 4 files — meaningful logic with an AI component.

prs.title: feat(ace): submit-for-review + consolidated ACE review in prospect editor (SM-563)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant ACE feature set introducing submit-for-review flow, a consolidated review UI, status banners, reconciliation, validator/mapper updates, and a connector deployment script across 16 files and 1620 lines.

prs.title: feat(ace): modal radio editor for Primary Needs from AWS (SM-546)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Focused UI feature adding a modal radio editor for AWS Primary Needs with supporting validator and standard-values updates across 6 files and 305 lines.

prs.title: Gate AI Alliances Assistant admin nav behind super admin
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial single-line config tweak gating a nav item behind super-admin in one file.

prs.title: fix(admin): attach skematic.ai users to the Skematic company + add edit-company UI
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Solid admin feature combining automatic company attachment for skematic.ai users with a new edit-company UI dialog and user-type library changes across 6 files and 473 lines.

prs.title: Fix overflowing profile name in the sidebar
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: Small UI fix addressing overflowing profile name in the sidebar across three layout/component files with 75 lines.

prs.title: feat(mcp): Add OAuth2 token endpoint for Quick Flows integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Modest but purposeful addition of an OAuth2 token endpoint for MCP/Quick Flows integration in a new route file with env config, 148 lines of custom logic.

prs.title: feat(mcp): Add playbook MCP server for Amazon Quick integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant new MCP server implementation with authentication, six distinct tool handlers, a README, and API routing across 13 files and 884 lines — a complete new integration surface.

prs.title: Sync staging with main + Dependabot dependency bumps
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Large sync PR consolidating a major navigation refactor, product switcher, performance page refactor, and dependency bumps across 46 files and 2165 lines — primarily Mauro's navigation work merged with Jason's integration commits.

prs.title: Sm 552/move navigation to navbar
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: Major navigation redesign moving from a static sidebar to a hover-expanding sidebar with a global product switcher, new icons, layout refactors, and admin nav decomposition across 44 files and 2159 lines.

prs.title: Release: rival-first onboarding, externalized HubSpot API, and deletion-cleanup batching
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major release PR encompassing rival-first onboarding flows, externalized HubSpot API, deletion-cleanup batching, schema migrations, extensive documentation, and broad cross-cutting changes across 91 files and nearly 5000 lines.

prs.title: refactor: address Copilot review nits from PR #451
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial nit-fix addressing Copilot review comments across 3 files with only 27 lines of changes.

prs.title: perf: batch S3 + Pinecone deletes in rival-deletion cleanup
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Batching S3 and Pinecone deletes across five service files is a meaningful performance refactor touching the vector store client, S3 service, and multiple cleanup services with 211 lines of custom logic.

prs.title: fix: bump Company.updatedAt on field-value writes for outbound sync
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Bumping Company.updatedAt on field-value writes is a modest targeted fix spanning the Prisma layer, an API route, and an admin page, with the bulk of additions being documentation updates rather than complex logic.

prs.title: Full-collection on onboarding for non-marketplace companies + rival hard-delete cleanup
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 884 lines across 13 files introducing full-collection triggering on onboarding for non-marketplace companies, a complete rival hard-delete cleanup flow with a BullMQ job, admin UI changes, scheduler logic, and unit tests represents a major feature with architectural breadth.

stories.name: Guided AI Experience for Business Readiness
stories.rationale: Delivered a guided, AI-driven onboarding and readiness experience to help users navigate the platform with intelligent assistance.

stories.name: ACE Partner Program Integration & Review Workflow
stories.rationale: Built end-to-end ACE partner submission capabilities including connecting opportunities to CRM deals, refreshing contacts at push time, a submit-for-review flow, and a modal editor for AWS Primary Needs.

stories.name: CRM Stage Mapping & AI Gap-Fill Accuracy
stories.rationale: Improved CRM stage mapping accuracy and used LLM-powered crosswalk logic to automatically fill gaps in deal stage data.

stories.name: AI Alliances Assistant Access Control
stories.rationale: Restricted the AI Alliances Assistant admin navigation to super admins to prevent unauthorized access.

stories.name: Skematic User Company Management & Admin UI
stories.rationale: Ensured skematic.ai users are properly attached to the Skematic company and added an edit-company UI for streamlined admin management.

stories.name: Sidebar Profile Display Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed an overflowing profile name in the sidebar to improve visual consistency and usability.

stories.name: MCP Server & OAuth2 Integration for Amazon Quick Flows
stories.rationale: Enabled Amazon Quick Flows integration by building a playbook MCP server and adding an OAuth2 token endpoint for secure authentication.

stories.name: Navigation Redesign & UI Modernization
stories.rationale: Moved primary navigation to the navbar to modernize the app layout and improve overall user navigation experience.

stories.name: Rival-First Onboarding, HubSpot Externalization & Deletion Cleanup
stories.rationale: Delivered a major platform release covering rival-first onboarding for non-marketplace companies, externalized HubSpot API configuration, batched S3 and Pinecone deletions for performance, and clean rival hard-delete lifecycle management.

stories.name: Outbound CRM Sync Reliability Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed a bug where Company.updatedAt was not being bumped on field-value writes, ensuring outbound CRM sync triggers correctly.
